messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

    "z_제1조목적_28": "Kifungu cha 1 (Madhumuni)",
    "z_본약관은Migo이하_29": "Madhumuni ya Sheria na Masharti haya ni kubainisha masharti na taratibu za matumizi ya ulinganishaji wa wasafiri na huduma za jumuiya zinazotolewa na Migo (hapa inajulikana kama \"Huduma\").",
    "z_제2조서비스이용_30": "Kifungu cha 2 (Matumizi ya Huduma)",
    "z_서비스는만18세이상_31": "Huduma hii inapatikana kwa watumiaji walio na umri wa miaka 18 au zaidi. Usajili wa taarifa za uongo, uigaji wa mtu mwingine, na matumizi kwa madhumuni haramu ni marufuku. Watumiaji lazima watumie Huduma kwa kufuata sheria husika na Sheria na Masharti haya.",
    "z_제3조계정관리_32": "Kifungu cha 3 (Usimamizi wa Akaunti)",

    "z_제4조콘텐츠_34": "Kifungu cha 4 (Maudhui)",
    "z_사용자가게시한콘텐츠_35": "Ingawa unahifadhi hakimiliki katika maudhui unayochapisha, Migo ina leseni isiyo ya kipekee ya kutumia maudhui kama haya kuendesha Huduma. Maudhui ambayo yanakiuka haki za wengine yanaweza kufutwa bila notisi ya mapema.",
    "z_제5조금지행위_36": "Kifungu cha 5 (Matendo Marufuku)",
    "z_다음행위는엄격히금지_37": "Vitendo vifuatavyo ni marufuku kabisa:",
    "z_스팸및허위정보유포_38": "Kueneza barua taka na habari za uwongo",
    "z_타인괴롭힘및혐오발언_39": "Unyanyasaji wa wengine na matamshi ya chuki",
    "z_불법콘텐츠게시_40": "Chapisha maudhui haramu",
    "z_서비스시스템접근시도_41": "Jaribio la kupata mfumo wa huduma",
    "z_상업적목적의무단이용_42": "Matumizi yasiyoidhinishwa kwa madhumuni ya kibiashara",
    "z_위반시사전경고없이계_43": "Ukiukaji unaweza kusababisha kusimamishwa au kufutwa mara moja kwa akaunti yako bila onyo la mapema.",
    "z_제6조서비스변경및중_44": "Kifungu cha 6 (Mabadiliko ya huduma na kusimamishwa)",
    "z_Migo는서비스를언_45": "Migo inaweza kubadilisha au kusitisha Huduma wakati wowote, na notisi ya angalau siku 7 ya mabadiliko yoyote muhimu. Migo haiwajibikii uharibifu wowote unaotokana na kukatizwa kwa huduma.",
    "z_제7조면책조항_46": "Kifungu cha 7 (Kanusho)",
    "z_Migo는사용자간발_47": "Migo haiwajibiki moja kwa moja kwa mizozo yoyote inayotokea kati ya watumiaji. Migo haiwajibiki kisheria kwa ajali, matatizo ya watu wengine, nk wakati wa kusafiri kutokana na matumizi ya huduma.",

    "z_환불정책및유료상품안_332": "Sera ya kurejesha pesa na maelezo ya bidhaa iliyolipwa",
    "z_Migo는전자상거래_333": "Migo inatii sheria na kanuni husika, ikiwa ni pamoja na Sheria ya Ulinzi wa Mtumiaji katika Biashara ya Kielektroniki, n.k., na inatumia kanuni za kurejesha pesa zinazolengwa na sifa za bidhaa za maudhui ya kidijitali.",
    "z_1유료상품MigoP_334": "1. Bei ya bidhaa ya kulipia (Migo Plus).",
    "z_1개월이용권1490_335": "■ Pasi ya mwezi 1: KRW 14,900 / mwezi",
    "z_3개월이용권2900_336": "■ Pasi ya miezi 3: KRW 29,000 / miezi 3 (takriban KRW 9,600 kwa mwezi)",
    "z_12개월이용권890_337": "■ Pasi ya miezi 12: KRW 89,000 / mwaka (takriban KRW 7,400 kwa mwezi, punguzo la 50%)",
    "z_최초결제시1일무료체_338": "* Jaribio la siku 1 bila malipo hutolewa baada ya malipo ya awali, na malipo hufanywa kiotomatiki kulingana na mzunguko uliowekwa baada ya jaribio kuisha.",
    "z_모든가격은부가세VA_339": "* Bei zote ni pamoja na kodi ya ongezeko la thamani (VAT).",
    "z_2청약철회및환불규정_340": "2. Kughairiwa kwa sera ya usajili na kurejesha fedha (rejesha za kisheria)",
    "z_유료결제후다음의경우_341": "Baada ya malipo, unaweza kuomba kughairiwa (kurejeshewa pesa kamili) ndani ya siku 7 kuanzia tarehe ya malipo katika hali zifuatazo:\n■ Ikiwa hujawahi kutumia huduma zinazolipishwa (kutuma vipendwa vya juu zaidi, kutumia vipengee vya nyongeza, kutumia vichujio vya hali ya juu, kutazama wageni wengine wa wasifu, n.k.) baada ya malipo.",
    "z_3청약철회가제한되는_342": "3. Kesi ambapo ughairi wa usajili umezuiwa",
    "z_디지털콘텐츠특성상다_343": "Kutokana na hali ya maudhui ya dijitali, urejeshaji kamili wa pesa (kughairi usajili) hauwezekani katika hali zifuatazo, na kimsingi, marejesho ya sehemu ya kipindi kilichobaki hayapatikani.\n■ Ikiwa tayari umetumia manufaa ya Migo Plus (kazi) zaidi ya mara moja baada ya malipo\n■ Kipindi cha majaribio ya bila malipo kinapoisha na malipo ya kiotomatiki kufanywa kwa kawaida (kughairi malipo ya kiotomatiki hakutoshi)\n■ Ikiwa akaunti yako imesimamishwa kabisa kwa sababu ya ukiukaji wa sera ya uendeshaji",
    "z_4자동갱신결제취소구_344": "4. Ghairi malipo ya kusasisha kiotomatiki (ghairi usajili)",
    "z_MigoPlus는정_345": "Migo Plus ni bidhaa ya usajili. Ili kuepuka gharama za ziada katika tarehe yako inayofuata ya bili, ni lazima ukamilishe 'Ghairi Usajili' katika mipangilio ya kifaa chako (Duka la Programu / Udhibiti wa Usajili wa Google Play) angalau saa 24 kabla ya tarehe yako ya bili iliyoratibiwa. Hata ukighairi usajili wako, manufaa ya huduma yako yatasalia hadi siku ya mwisho ya kipindi ambacho tayari umelipia.",
    "z_5미성년자결제취소_346": "5. Kughairi malipo kwa watoto",
    "z_미성년자만19세미만_347": "Ikiwa mtoto (chini ya umri wa miaka 19) analipa bidhaa iliyolipwa bila idhini ya mwakilishi wake wa kisheria, mtoto mdogo au mwakilishi wake wa kisheria anaweza kufuta malipo. Hata hivyo, vighairi vitatumika ikiwa mtu anayesimamia kifaa cha malipo ni mtu mzima au ikiwa mtoto amedanganywa kuamini kwamba yeye ni mtu mzima.",
    "z_환불신청및고객센터안_348": "Ombi la kurejesha pesa na maelezo ya kituo cha wateja",
    "z_요청양식이메일로결제_349": "Fomu ya Ombi: Tutumie barua pepe habari ya malipo (nakala ya risiti) na sababu.",

    "j545": "1. Vitu vya habari vya kibinafsi vilivyokusanywa",
    "j546": "Inahitajika:",
    "j547": "Barua pepe, jina, nambari ya simu, umri, jinsia, nenosiri (iliyosimbwa kwa njia fiche)",
    "j548": "Chagua:",
    "j549": "Picha ya wasifu, mtindo wa usafiri, mambo yanayokuvutia, lugha inayozungumzwa, eneo linalopendekezwa, kujitambulisha",
    "j550": "Mkusanyiko otomatiki:",
    "j551": "Fikia IP, maelezo ya kifaa, rekodi za matumizi ya huduma (takwimu zisizojulikana)",

    "j560": "Itahifadhiwa hadi uondoaji wa uanachama na itaharibiwa ndani ya siku 30 baada ya kujiondoa.",

    "z_autoz한줄소개3_460": "utangulizi wa mstari mmoja",

    "z_Google로그인실_466": "Kuingia kwa Google kumeshindwa",
    "z_autoz환불정책및_467": "Sera ya kurejesha pesa na maelezo ya bidhaa iliyolipwa",
    "z_autozMigo는_468": "Migo inatii sheria na kanuni husika, ikiwa ni pamoja na Sheria ya Ulinzi wa Mtumiaji katika Biashara ya Kielektroniki, n.k., na inatumia kanuni za kurejesha pesa zinazolengwa na sifa za bidhaa za maudhui ya kidijitali.",
    "z_autoz1유료상품_469": "1. Bei ya bidhaa ya kulipia (Migo Plus).",
    "z_autoz1개월이용_470": "■ Pasi ya mwezi 1: KRW 14,900 / mwezi",
    "z_autoz3개월이용_471": "■ Pasi ya miezi 3: KRW 29,000 / miezi 3 (takriban KRW 9,600 kwa mwezi)",
    "z_autoz12개월이_472": "■ Pasi ya miezi 12: KRW 89,000 / mwaka (takriban KRW 7,400 kwa mwezi, punguzo la 50%)",
    "z_autoz최초결제시_473": "* Jaribio la siku 1 bila malipo hutolewa baada ya malipo ya awali, na malipo hufanywa kiotomatiki kulingana na mzunguko uliowekwa baada ya jaribio kuisha.",
    "z_autoz모든가격은_474": "* Bei zote ni pamoja na kodi ya ongezeko la thamani (VAT).",
    "z_autoz2청약철회_475": "2. Kughairiwa kwa sera ya usajili na kurejesha fedha (rejesha za kisheria)",
    "z_autoz유료결제후_476": "Baada ya malipo, unaweza kuomba kughairiwa (kurejeshewa pesa kamili) ndani ya siku 7 kuanzia tarehe ya malipo katika hali zifuatazo:\n■ Ikiwa hujawahi kutumia huduma zinazolipishwa (kutuma vipendwa vya juu zaidi, kutumia vipengee vya nyongeza, kutumia vichujio vya hali ya juu, kutazama wageni wengine wa wasifu, n.k.) baada ya malipo.",
    "z_autoz3청약철회_477": "3. Kesi ambapo ughairi wa usajili umezuiwa",
    "z_autoz디지털콘텐_478": "Kutokana na hali ya maudhui ya dijitali, urejeshaji kamili wa pesa (kughairi usajili) hauwezekani katika hali zifuatazo, na kimsingi, marejesho ya sehemu ya kipindi kilichobaki hayapatikani.\n■ Ikiwa tayari umetumia manufaa ya Migo Plus (kazi) zaidi ya mara moja baada ya malipo\n■ Kipindi cha majaribio ya bila malipo kinapoisha na malipo ya kiotomatiki kufanywa kwa kawaida (kughairi malipo ya kiotomatiki hakutoshi)\n■ Ikiwa akaunti yako imesimamishwa kabisa kwa sababu ya ukiukaji wa sera ya uendeshaji",
    "z_autoz4자동갱신_479": "4. Ghairi malipo ya kusasisha kiotomatiki (ghairi usajili)",
    "z_autozMigoP_480": "Migo Plus ni bidhaa ya usajili. Ili kuepuka gharama za ziada katika tarehe yako inayofuata ya bili, ni lazima ukamilishe 'Ghairi Usajili' katika mipangilio ya kifaa chako (Duka la Programu / Udhibiti wa Usajili wa Google Play) angalau saa 24 kabla ya tarehe yako ya bili iliyoratibiwa. Hata ukighairi usajili wako, manufaa ya huduma yako yatasalia hadi siku ya mwisho ya kipindi ambacho tayari umelipia.",
    "z_autoz5미성년자_481": "5. Kughairi malipo kwa watoto",
    "z_autoz미성년자만_482": "Ikiwa mtoto (chini ya umri wa miaka 19) analipa bidhaa iliyolipwa bila idhini ya mwakilishi wake wa kisheria, mtoto mdogo au mwakilishi wake wa kisheria anaweza kufuta malipo. Hata hivyo, vighairi vitatumika ikiwa mtu anayesimamia kifaa cha malipo ni mtu mzima au ikiwa mtoto amedanganywa kuamini kwamba yeye ni mtu mzima.",
    "z_autoz환불신청및_483": "Ombi la kurejesha pesa na maelezo ya kituo cha wateja",
    "z_autoz요청양식이_484": "Fomu ya Ombi: Tutumie barua pepe habari ya malipo (nakala ya risiti) na sababu.",
    "z_autoz이메일su_485": "Barua pepe: support@lunaticsgroup.com",

    "z_autozautoz_355": "Ikiwa utajumuisha herufi kubwa, nambari na herufi maalum (!@#$), nenosiri lako litakuwa thabiti. Tafadhali usitumie siku yako ya kuzaliwa au jina.",

    "z_autozautoz_361": "[Inahitajika] Kubali Masharti ya Matumizi",
    "z_autozautoz_362": "Sheria na masharti ya msingi ya kutumia huduma",
    "z_autozautoz_363": "[Inahitajika] Idhini ya kukusanya na kutumia taarifa za kibinafsi",
    "z_autozautoz_364": "Taarifa za chini zinazohitajika kwa usajili wa wanachama na utoaji wa huduma",
    "z_autozautoz_365": "[Inahitajika] Thibitisha kuwa una umri wa miaka 18 au zaidi",
    "z_autozautoz_366": "Migo ni huduma ya watu wazima",
    "z_autozautoz_367": "[Inahitajika] Kubali miongozo ya usalama",
    "z_autozautoz_368": "Sera inayokataza lugha chafu, ulaghai, wasifu wa uongo n.k.",
    "z_autozautoz_369": "[Si lazima] Kubali arifa za uuzaji/manufaa",
    "z_autozautoz_370": "Pokea maalum za usafiri na manufaa ya tukio",
    "z_autozautoz_371": "Migo",
    "z_autozautoz_372": "Utambulisho Umethibitishwa Mtumiaji Halisi",
    "z_autozautoz_373": "Unaweza kuitumia tu. Ukisajili taarifa za uongo, akaunti yako inaweza kusimamishwa kabisa.",
    "z_autozautoz_374": "picha ya wasifu",
    "z_autozautoz_375": "inahitajika",
    "z_autozautoz_376": "ndefu)",
    "z_autozautoz_377": "mwakilishi",
    "z_autozautoz_378": "ongeza picha",
    "z_autozautoz_379": "Picha ya kwanza inatumika kama picha ya mwakilishi. Ikiwa una picha, unapata mechi 30% zaidi!",
    "z_autozautoz_380": "utangulizi wa mstari mmoja",
    "z_autozautoz_381": "Je, ni matukio gani unayotafuta unaposafiri? 🌏",
    "z_autozautoz_382": "mtindo wa kusafiri",
    "z_autozautoz_383": "(chaguzi nyingi)",
    "z_autozautoz_384": "lugha inayozungumzwa",
    "z_autozautoz_385": "Mahali pa kuvutia",
    "z_소셜로그인에러_386": "hitilafu ya kuingia kwenye jamii",
    "z_autozautoz_387": "Sera ya kurejesha pesa na maelezo ya bidhaa iliyolipwa",
    "z_autozautoz_388": "Migo inatii sheria na kanuni husika, ikiwa ni pamoja na Sheria ya Ulinzi wa Mtumiaji katika Biashara ya Kielektroniki, n.k., na inatumia kanuni za kurejesha pesa zinazolengwa na sifa za bidhaa za maudhui ya kidijitali.",
    "z_autozautoz_389": "1. Bei ya bidhaa ya kulipia (Migo Plus).",
    "z_autozautoz_390": "■ Pasi ya mwezi 1: KRW 14,900 / mwezi",
    "z_autozautoz_391": "■ Pasi ya miezi 3: KRW 29,000 / miezi 3 (takriban KRW 9,600 kwa mwezi)",
    "z_autozautoz_392": "■ Pasi ya miezi 12: KRW 89,000 / mwaka (takriban KRW 7,400 kwa mwezi, punguzo la 50%)",
    "z_autozautoz_393": "* Jaribio la siku 1 bila malipo hutolewa baada ya malipo ya awali, na malipo hufanywa kiotomatiki kulingana na mzunguko uliowekwa baada ya jaribio kuisha.",
    "z_autozautoz_394": "* Bei zote ni pamoja na kodi ya ongezeko la thamani (VAT).",
    "z_autozautoz_395": "2. Kughairiwa kwa sera ya usajili na kurejesha fedha (rejesha za kisheria)",
    "z_autozautoz_396": "Baada ya malipo, unaweza kuomba kughairiwa (kurejeshewa pesa kamili) ndani ya siku 7 kuanzia tarehe ya malipo katika hali zifuatazo:\n■ Ikiwa hujawahi kutumia huduma zinazolipishwa (kutuma vipendwa vya juu zaidi, kutumia vipengee vya nyongeza, kutumia vichujio vya hali ya juu, kutazama wageni wengine wa wasifu, n.k.) baada ya malipo.",
    "z_autozautoz_397": "3. Kesi ambapo ughairi wa usajili umezuiwa",
    "z_autozautoz_398": "Kutokana na hali ya maudhui ya dijitali, urejeshaji kamili wa pesa (kughairi usajili) hauwezekani katika hali zifuatazo, na kimsingi, marejesho ya sehemu ya kipindi kilichobaki hayapatikani.\n■ Ikiwa tayari umetumia manufaa ya Migo Plus (kazi) zaidi ya mara moja baada ya malipo\n■ Kipindi cha majaribio ya bila malipo kinapoisha na malipo ya kiotomatiki kufanywa kwa kawaida (kughairi malipo ya kiotomatiki hakutoshi)\n■ Ikiwa akaunti yako imesimamishwa kabisa kwa sababu ya ukiukaji wa sera ya uendeshaji",
    "z_autozautoz_399": "4. Ghairi malipo ya kusasisha kiotomatiki (ghairi usajili)",
    "z_autozautoz_400": "5. Kughairi malipo kwa watoto",
    "z_autozautoz_401": "Ikiwa mtoto (chini ya umri wa miaka 19) analipa bidhaa iliyolipwa bila idhini ya mwakilishi wake wa kisheria, mtoto mdogo au mwakilishi wake wa kisheria anaweza kufuta malipo. Hata hivyo, vighairi vitatumika ikiwa mtu anayesimamia kifaa cha malipo ni mtu mzima au ikiwa mtoto amedanganywa kuamini kwamba yeye ni mtu mzima.",
    "z_autozautoz_402": "Ombi la kurejesha pesa na maelezo ya kituo cha wateja",
    "z_autozautoz_403": "Fomu ya Ombi: Tutumie barua pepe habari ya malipo (nakala ya risiti) na sababu.",
    "z_autozautoz_404": "Barua pepe: support@lunaticsgroup.com",
    "z_autozAPK다운_405": "Pakua APK",

    "z_autozAPK파일_409": "Endesha faili ya APK",

  "guide.match.superlike.label": "super kama",

  "guide.match.mission.label": "kusudi la leo",
  "guide.match.mission.desc": "Kuweka madhumuni yako ya kusafiri kwa siku (kula migahawa, kuona maeneo ya utalii, tafrija, n.k.) kutakusaidia kuungana vyema na wasafiri walio na malengo sawa.",
  "guide.match.notif.label": "taarifa",

  "guide.match.filter.desc": "Unaweza kuchuja kulingana na umri, jinsia, umbali, MBTI, mtindo wa usafiri, n.k. kwa kutumia aikoni ya kichujio iliyo juu.",
  "guide.discover.title": "🧭 Jinsi ya kutumia skrini ya kusogeza",

  "guide.discover.feed.label": "malisho",

  "guide.map.title": "📍 Jinsi ya kutumia skrini ya ramani",

  "guide.map.groups.label": "kukusanyika karibu",

  "guide.chat.meet.label": "pendekezo la mkutano",

  "auto.g_0781": "Plus pekee",
  "auto.g_0782": "?km au hivyo",
  "auto.g_0783": "Uharibifu wa kiotomatiki wa maelezo ya eneo:",
  "auto.g_0784": "Ili kuhakikisha uthabiti wa huduma, data yote ya eneo (GPS) inayokusanywa mara moja haitatambuliwa kabisa (NULL) na kipanga ratiba kiotomatiki cha nyuma (Cron) saa 24 baada ya ufikiaji wa mwisho.",
  "auto.g_0785": "CASCADE baada ya kujiondoa:",
  "auto.g_0786": "Mwanachama anapojiondoa, rekodi ya akaunti ya kiwango cha juu huondolewa na data yote inayotokana na akaunti kama vile wasifu, historia inayolingana, ujumbe wa chumba cha mazungumzo na historia ya malipo hufutwa.",
  "auto.g_0788": "imefutwa kabisa kutoka kwa diski halisi.",
  "auto.g_0789": "Sera ya Faragha",
  "auto.g_0790": "Sera ya Faragha ya Migo",
  "auto.g_0879": "1. Vitu vya habari vya kibinafsi vilivyokusanywa",
  "auto.g_0792": "Unapotumia huduma zetu, tunakusanya taarifa zifuatazo:",
  "auto.g_0793": "Vipengee vinavyohitajika:",
  "auto.g_0794": "Anwani ya barua pepe, nenosiri (hifadhi iliyosimbwa), jina la utani, tarehe ya kuzaliwa (kwa uthibitishaji wa umri), jinsia",
  "auto.g_0795": "Vipengee vya hiari:",
  "auto.g_0796": "Picha ya wasifu, kujitambulisha, mahali pa kusafiri, uraia, MBTI, lebo ya usafiri",
  "auto.g_0797": "Maelezo ya eneo:",
  "auto.g_0798": "Mahali unapotumia programu (viwianishi vya GPS) — huonyeshwa kwa wasafiri walio karibu pekee, hufutwa mara moja wakati wa kuondoka",
  "auto.g_0799": "Kuingia kwa jamii:",
  "auto.g_0800": "Barua pepe na jina wakati wa kuunganisha akaunti ya Google/Apple (nenosiri halijakusanywa)",
  "auto.g_0801": "Taarifa ya Uthibitishaji:",
  "auto.g_0802": "Picha ya kitambulisho (iliyofutwa mara baada ya uthibitishaji kukamilika), nambari ya simu",
  "auto.g_0803": "Maelezo ya kifaa:",
  "auto.g_0804": "Kitambulisho cha Kifaa, toleo la Mfumo wa Uendeshaji, toleo la programu, tokeni ya kushinikiza",
  "auto.g_0805": "Historia ya matumizi:",
  "auto.g_0806": "Muda wa matumizi ya huduma, historia inayolingana, ujumbe wa gumzo",
  "auto.g_0880": "2. Madhumuni ya kukusanya na kutumia taarifa za kibinafsi",
  "auto.g_0807": "Kusudi la matumizi",
  "auto.g_0808": "vitu vya kukusanya",
  "auto.g_0809": "kipindi cha uhifadhi",
  "auto.g_0810": "Usajili na usimamizi wa wanachama",
  "auto.g_0811": "Barua pepe, nenosiri, jina la utani",
  "auto.g_0812": "Hadi kujiondoa",
  "auto.g_0813": "Ulinganishaji kulingana na eneo",
  "auto.g_0814": "eneo la gps",
  "auto.g_0815": "Saa 24 baada ya kutoka",
  "auto.g_0816": "huduma ya mazungumzo",
  "auto.g_0817": "ujumbe, vyombo vya habari",
  "auto.g_0818": "Hadi kujiondoa",
  "auto.g_0819": "Malipo na usajili",
  "auto.g_0820": "Rekodi za malipo (nambari ya kadi haijahifadhiwa)",
  "auto.g_0821": "Miaka 5 (Sheria ya Biashara ya Kielektroniki)",
  "auto.g_0822": "Uthibitishaji wa kitambulisho",
  "auto.g_0823": "Picha ya kitambulisho",
  "auto.g_0824": "Imefutwa mara moja baada ya kukamilika kwa uthibitishaji",
  "auto.g_0825": "arifa ya kushinikiza",
  "auto.g_0826": "Kitambulisho cha kifaa, ishara ya kushinikiza",
  "auto.g_0827": "Hadi arifa zimezimwa",
  "auto.g_0881": "3. Utoaji wa taarifa za kibinafsi kwa wahusika wengine",
  "auto.g_0828": "Kimsingi, kampuni haitoi maelezo ya kibinafsi ya watumiaji kwa wahusika wengine.Walakini, kuna tofauti katika kesi zifuatazo:",
  "auto.g_0829": "Ikiwa mtumiaji ametoa idhini ya wazi mapema",
  "auto.g_0830": "Katika kesi kulingana na sheria na kanuni (vibali halali kutoka kwa mashirika ya uchunguzi, nk)",
  "auto.g_0831": "Udhamini wa biashara na huduma za watu wengine:",
  "auto.g_0832": "Supabase (Marekani)",
  "auto.g_0833": "- Hifadhidata/Seva ya Uthibitishaji",
  "auto.g_0834": "Arifa za Apple (Marekani)",
  "auto.g_0835": "- Arifa za kushinikiza",
  "auto.g_0836": "Google (Marekani)",
  "auto.g_0837": "- Kuingia kwa Jamii, API ya Ramani",
  "auto.g_0838": "OpenAI (Marekani)",
  "auto.g_0839": "- Kipengele cha safari ya AI",
  "auto.g_0840": "Wadhamini waliotajwa hapo juu hufikia kiwango cha chini kabisa cha data kwa madhumuni ya kutoa huduma.",
  "auto.g_0882": "4. Ufuatiliaji wa Matangazo (Uwazi wa Ufuatiliaji wa Programu - ATT)",
  "auto.g_0841": "Kwa mujibu wa sera ya Apple ya Ufuatiliaji wa Uwazi wa Kufuatilia Programu (ATT), idhini ya ufuatiliaji wa matangazo (IDFA) inaweza kuombwa kivyake wakati programu inapozinduliwa mara ya kwanza baada ya kusakinisha.",
  "auto.g_0842": "Hata kama hukubaliani, bado unaweza kutumia vipengele vyote vya msingi vya programu.",
  "auto.g_0843": "Ondoa idhini: Unaweza kubadilisha hii wakati wowote katika Mipangilio ya iOS → Faragha na Usalama → Ufuatiliaji.",
  "auto.g_0883": "5. Maelezo ya kibinafsi yanayohusiana na malipo ya ndani ya programu na usajili",
  "auto.g_0844": "Malipo ya usajili wa Migo Plus / Premium huchakatwa kupitia mfumo wa Apple wa Malipo ya Ndani ya Programu (IAP).Kampuni haihifadhi nambari za kadi ya mkopo moja kwa moja, na mizozo ya malipo inategemea sera za Duka la Programu.",
  "auto.g_0845": "Ghairi usajili: Inapatikana katika Mipangilio ya iOS → Kitambulisho cha Apple → Usajili.",
  "auto.g_0884": "6. Hatua za ulinzi wa taarifa za kibinafsi",
  "auto.g_0846": "Mawasiliano yote: usimbaji fiche wa SSL/TLS",
  "auto.g_0847": "Nenosiri: Hifadhi heshi ya bcrypt (maandishi asili hayajahifadhiwa)",
  "auto.g_0848": "Uthibitishaji wa msingi wa tokeni ya JWT, hutupwa kiotomatiki baada ya muda wake kuisha",
  "auto.g_0849": "Tumia hifadhidata ya Usalama wa Kiwango cha Safu (RLS)",
  "auto.g_0850": "Kutumia kanuni ya upendeleo mdogo ili kupunguza ufikiaji usio wa lazima wa habari za kibinafsi",
  "auto.g_0885": "7. Taratibu na mbinu za uharibifu wa taarifa za kibinafsi",
  "auto.g_0851": "Wakati wa kughairi uanachama:",
  "auto.g_0852": "Sera ya CASCADE DELETE itasababisha data ifuatayo kufutwa mara moja na kabisa (isiyoweza kurejeshwa):",
  "auto.g_0853": "Maelezo ya wasifu (jina, picha, tarehe ya kuzaliwa, n.k.)",
  "auto.g_0854": "Maelezo ya eneo na historia inayolingana",
  "auto.g_0855": "Vyumba vya mazungumzo na ujumbe wote",
  "auto.g_0856": "Maelezo ya usajili na malipo (bila kujumuisha muda wa kubaki kisheria)",
  "auto.g_0857": "Hata hivyo, kwa mujibu wa Sheria ya Biashara ya Kielektroniki, rekodi za malipo huhifadhiwa kwa miaka 5 na kisha kuharibiwa.",
  "auto.g_0858": "8. Ulinzi wa Faragha ya Watoto (COPPA)",
  "auto.g_0859": "⚠️ Migo haijakusudiwa watumiaji walio chini ya umri wa miaka 18.",
  "auto.g_0860": "Umri wako utathibitishwa utakapojisajili, na ikiwa umethibitishwa kuwa mtoto, akaunti yako itafutwa mara moja.Hatukusanyi taarifa za kibinafsi kwa makusudi kutoka kwa watoto walio na umri wa chini ya miaka 13 (uzingatiaji wa COPPA).",
  "auto.g_0861": "9. Haki za Mtumiaji za EU/EEA (GDPR)",
  "auto.g_0862": "Ikiwa wewe ni mkazi wa Eneo la Kiuchumi la Ulaya (EEA), una haki zifuatazo chini ya GDPR:",
  "auto.g_0863": "Haki ya kuondoa idhini ya kuchakata maelezo ya kibinafsi",
  "auto.g_0864": "Haki ya kupata taarifa (ombi la kuona taarifa za kibinafsi zinazoshikiliwa)",
  "auto.g_0865": "Haki ya kusahihisha (ombi la marekebisho ya taarifa zisizo sahihi)",
  "auto.g_0866": "Haki ya kufuta (haki ya kusahaulika)",
  "auto.g_0867": "Haki ya kizuizi cha usindikaji",
  "auto.g_0868": "Haki ya kubebeka kwa data",
  "auto.g_0869": "Tumia haki zako:",
  "auto.g_0870": "Ukituma ombi, litashughulikiwa ndani ya siku 30.",
  "auto.g_0886": "10. Meneja wa ulinzi wa taarifa za kibinafsi na maswali",
  "auto.g_0871": "Jina la Kampuni:",
  "auto.g_0872": "Afisa ulinzi wa habari za kibinafsi:",
  "auto.g_0873": "Wimbo wa Woojin (Mkurugenzi Mtendaji)",
  "auto.g_0874": "Barua pepe:",
  "auto.g_0875": "Usaidizi kwa Wateja:",
  "auto.g_0876": "Tafadhali wasilisha malalamiko kuhusu taarifa za kibinafsi kwa anwani ya barua pepe iliyo hapo juu.Ukiibua pingamizi halali, tutalishughulikia mara moja.",
  "auto.g_0877": "Sera hii itaanza kutumika kuanzia tarehe 2 Aprili 2026.",
  "auto.g_0878": "Mabadiliko yoyote yataarifiwa siku 7 mapema kupitia ilani ya ndani ya programu au barua pepe.",
  "auto.g_0896": "Kushindwa kwa kuanzisha gumzo:",
  "auto.g_0897": "Pakia picha",
  "auto.g_0898": "Hifadhi wasifu",
  "auto.g_0899": "hakuna eneo",
  "auto.g_0900": "eneo halijulikani",

  "auto.g_0887": "Jacks zaidi za solo kama vile ulinganishaji wa watumiaji",

  "auto.g_1019": "Tafadhali tuma ombi kupitia.",
  "auto.g_1020": "Ghairi usajili: Mipangilio ya iOS >Kitambulisho cha Apple >Inapatikana kupitia usajili.",
  "auto.g_1021": "Kwa sababu ya asili ya maudhui ya dijitali (bidhaa zinazoweza kutumika kama vile Boosts na Superlikes), inaweza kuwa vigumu kurejesha pesa za bidhaa zilizotumika.",
  "auto.g_1041": "Mabadiliko ya huduma na kukatizwa",
  "auto.g_1022": "Kampuni inaweza kubadilisha au kusitisha huduma, na itakuarifu siku 30 mapema kupitia ilani ya ndani ya programu au barua pepe.",
  "auto.g_1023": "Katika hali zisizoweza kuepukika kama vile viraka vya usalama, inaweza kusimamishwa kwa muda bila ilani ya mapema.",
  "auto.g_1042": "Kanusho",
  "auto.g_1024": "Migo ni jukwaa la muunganisho wa msafiri-kwa-msafiri na haiwajibikii moja kwa moja mizozo, ajali au miamala ya kifedha inayotokea kati ya watumiaji.",
  "auto.g_1025": "Tafadhali zingatia usalama wa kibinafsi kabla ya kukutana nje ya mtandao, kama vile kuchagua eneo la umma na kushiriki ratiba yako na watu unaowajua.",
  "auto.g_1026": "Kampuni huweka kikomo dhima ya upotevu wa data na upotevu wa biashara unaotokea wakati wa kutumia Huduma kwa kiwango kinachoruhusiwa na sheria.",
  "auto.g_1043": "Utatuzi wa Mizozo na Sheria ya Utawala",
  "auto.g_1027": "Sheria na Masharti haya yatafasiriwa kwa mujibu wa sheria za Jamhuri ya Korea.",
  "auto.g_1028": "Mizozo inayohusiana na matumizi ya huduma itasimamiwa na Mahakama ya Wilaya ya Kati ya Seoul.",
  "auto.g_1029": "Kwa watumiaji wa ng'ambo, sheria za ndani zinaweza kuchukua kipaumbele.",
  "auto.g_1030": "Wasiliana nasi",
  "auto.g_1031": "Kwa maswali kuhusu Masharti ya Matumizi:",
  "auto.g_1032": "Lunatics Group Inc.|Mwakilishi: Song Woojin",
  "auto.g_1033": "Sheria na masharti haya yatatumika kuanzia tarehe 2 Aprili 2026.",

  "auto.g_1443": "(chaguzi nyingi zinawezekana)",
  "auto.g_1444": "Lugha zinazopatikana",
  "auto.g_1445": "Eneo la riba",
  "auto.g_1446": "Sera ya kurejesha pesa na maelezo ya matumizi ya huduma zinazolipwa",
  "auto.g_1447": "Watoto walio chini ya umri wa miaka 18 hawawezi kujiunga.",
  "auto.g_1448": "1. Taarifa ya tikiti ya malipo",
  "auto.g_1449": "Mpango msingi wa mwezi 1: ₩35,000 / mwezi",
  "auto.g_1450": "Mpango wa kawaida wa miezi 3: ₩89,000",
  "auto.g_1451": "Mpango wa kila mwaka wa miezi 12: ₩250,000",
  "auto.g_1452": "Wakati wa kulipia usajili, malipo hutozwa kiotomatiki katika kipindi kilichowekwa.",
  "auto.g_1453": "Bei iliyo hapo juu inajumuisha ushuru wa ongezeko la thamani (VAT).",
  "auto.g_1454": "2. Sera ya kurejesha pesa na kughairi (kabla ya matumizi)",
  "auto.g_1455": "Iwapo hujatumia bidhaa zozote zinazolingana na faida au zinazolipwa baada ya malipo, urejeshewa pesa kamili ndani ya siku 7 kuanzia tarehe ya malipo.",
  "auto.g_1456": "3. Sera isiyorejeshewa pesa (baada ya matumizi)",
  "auto.g_1457": "Ikiwa tayari umetumia kipengele cha kutelezesha kidole kinacholipiwa au zaidi ya siku 7 zimepita tangu malipo, urejeshaji wa pesa zako ukakataliwa.",
  "auto.g_1458": "4. Hali ya usajili na malipo ya kiotomatiki",
  "auto.g_1459": "Hata ukighairi malipo ya kiotomatiki, usajili wako utaendelea kama kawaida kwa kipindi cha sasa kinacholipiwa.",
  "auto.g_1460": "5. Kanuni za wawakilishi wa kisheria kwa watoto",
  "auto.g_1461": "Malipo yaliyofanywa na watoto bila idhini ya mzazi au mwakilishi mwingine wa kisheria yatarejeshwa kamili baada ya kuthibitishwa.",
  "auto.g_1462": "Kwa maombi ya kurejeshewa pesa na maswali mengine,",

  "auto.g_1464": "Tafadhali wasiliana na support@lunaticsgroup.com.",

messages.message: Unnecessary escape character: \ .

suggestions.desc: Remove the `\`. This maintains the current functionality.
Replace the `\` with `\\` to include the actual backslash character.

    "z_이용약관_27": "Imigomo Yokusebenzisa",
    "z_제1조목적_28": "I-athikili 1 (Inhloso)",
    "z_본약관은Migo이하_29": "Injongo yale Migomo Nemibandela iwukucacisa imibandela nezinqubo zokusebenzisa ukufanisa abahambi kanye nezinsizakalo zomphakathi ezihlinzekwa yi-Migo (ngemuva kwalokhu ebizwa ngokuthi “Isevisi”).",
    "z_제2조서비스이용_30": "I-athikili 2 (Ukusetshenziswa Kwesevisi)",
    "z_서비스는만18세이상_31": "Isevisi itholakala kubasebenzisi abaneminyaka engu-18 noma ngaphezulu. Ukubhaliswa kolwazi olungamanga, ukuzenza ongeyena, kanye nokusetshenziselwa izinjongo ezingekho emthethweni akuvunyelwe. Abasebenzisi kufanele basebenzise Isevisi ngokuthobela imithetho efanele kanye nale Migomo Nemibandela.",
    "z_제3조계정관리_32": "I-athikili 3 (Ukuphathwa kwe-akhawunti)",
    "z_사용자는계정보안에대_33": "Unesibopho sokuvikeleka kwe-akhawunti yakho. Awukwazi ukudlulisa noma wabelane nge-akhawunti yakho nabanye. Uma usola ukwebiwa kwe-akhawunti, kufanele ubike ngokushesha ku-Migo.",
    "z_제4조콘텐츠_34": "I-athikili 4 (Okuqukethwe)",
    "z_사용자가게시한콘텐츠_35": "Nakuba ugcina i-copyright kokuqukethwe okuthumele, i-Migo inelayisensi engakhethekile yokusebenzisa okuqukethwe okunjalo ukuze iqhube Isevisi. Okuqukethwe okwephula amalungelo abanye kungase kususwe ngaphandle kwesaziso sangaphambili.",
    "z_제5조금지행위_36": "I-athikili 5 (Izenzo Ezinqatshelwe)",
    "z_다음행위는엄격히금지_37": "Izenzo ezilandelayo zinqatshelwe ngokuphelele:",
    "z_스팸및허위정보유포_38": "Ukusabalalisa ugaxekile nolwazi olungamanga",
    "z_타인괴롭힘및혐오발언_39": "Ukuhlukumeza abanye nenkulumo enenzondo",
    "z_불법콘텐츠게시_40": "Thumela okuqukethwe okungekho emthethweni",
    "z_서비스시스템접근시도_41": "Umzamo wokufinyelela ohlelweni lwesevisi",
    "z_상업적목적의무단이용_42": "Ukusetshenziswa okungagunyaziwe ngezinjongo zokuthengisa",
    "z_위반시사전경고없이계_43": "Ukwephula kungase kubangele ukumiswa ngokushesha noma ukususwa kwe-akhawunti yakho ngaphandle kwesixwayiso sangaphambili.",
    "z_제6조서비스변경및중_44": "I-Athikili 6 (Ushintsho lwesevisi nokumiswa)",
    "z_Migo는서비스를언_45": "I-Migo ingase iguqule noma inqamule Isevisi nganoma yisiphi isikhathi, ngesaziso okungenani sezinsuku ezingu-7 sanoma yiziphi izinguquko ezibonakalayo. I-Migo ayinasibopho sanoma yimuphi umonakalo ovela ngenxa yokuphazamiseka kwesevisi.",
    "z_제7조면책조항_46": "I-Athikili 7 (Umshwana Wokuzihlangula)",
    "z_Migo는사용자간발_47": "I-Migo ayinacala ngokuqondile kunoma yiziphi izingxabano eziphakama phakathi kwabasebenzisi. U-Migo akanacala ngokusemthethweni ngezingozi, izinkinga phakathi kwabantu, njll. ngenkathi ehamba ngenxa yokusebenzisa isevisi.",

    "z_첫번째사진이대표사진_325": "Isithombe sokuqala sisetshenziswa njengesithombe esimele. Uma unesithombe, uthola okufanayo okungu-30% ngaphezulu!",

    "z_환불정책및유료상품안_332": "Inqubomgomo yembuyiselo nolwazi lomkhiqizo okhokhelwayo",
    "z_Migo는전자상거래_333": "I-Migo ithobelana nemithetho neziqondiso ezifanele, okuhlanganisa Umthetho Wokuvikelwa Kwabathengi Ku-Electronic Commerce, njll., futhi isebenzisa imithetho yembuyiselo eklanyelwe izici zemikhiqizo yokuqukethwe kwedijithali.",
    "z_1유료상품MigoP_334": "1. Intengo yomkhiqizo okhokhelwayo (Migo Plus).",
    "z_1개월이용권1490_335": "■ Ukudlula kwenyanga engu-1: KRW 14,900 / ngenyanga",
    "z_3개월이용권2900_336": "■ Ukudlula kwezinyanga ezi-3: KRW 29,000 / izinyanga ezi-3 (cishe u-KRW 9,600 ngenyanga)",
    "z_12개월이용권890_337": "■ Ukudlula kwezinyanga eziyi-12: KRW 89,000 / ngonyaka (cishe u-KRW 7,400 ngenyanga, isaphulelo esingu-50%)",
    "z_최초결제시1일무료체_338": "* Isivivinyo samahhala sosuku olungu-1 sinikezwa enkokhelweni yokuqala, futhi inkokhelo yenziwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngokuya ngomjikelezo omisiwe ngemva kokuphela kwesivivinyo samahhala.",
    "z_모든가격은부가세VA_339": "* Zonke izintengo zifaka phakathi intela ye-value added (VAT).",
    "z_2청약철회및환불규정_340": "2. Ukukhanselwa kokubhaliselwe kanye nenqubomgomo yembuyiselo (ukubuyiselwa kwemali okusemthethweni)",
    "z_유료결제후다음의경우_341": "Ngemva kokukhokha, ungacela ukukhansela (ukubuyiselwa imali okuphelele) zingakapheli izinsuku ezingu-7 kusukela ngedethi yokukhokha kulezi zimo ezilandelayo:\n■ Uma ungakaze usebenzise amasevisi akhokhelwayo (ukuthumela ukuthandwa okukhulu, ukusebenzisa izinto ezikhuthazayo, ukusebenzisa izihlungi ezithuthukisiwe, ukubuka ezinye izivakashi zephrofayela, njll.) ngemva kokukhokha.",
    "z_3청약철회가제한되는_342": "3. Izimo lapho ukukhanselwa kokubhalisa kukhawulelwe khona",
    "z_디지털콘텐츠특성상다_343": "Ngenxa yemvelo yokuqukethwe kwedijithali, ukubuyiselwa kwemali okugcwele (ukukhansela okubhaliselwe) akunakwenzeka ezimweni ezilandelayo, futhi ngokomthetho, ukubuyiselwa kwemali okuyingxenye yesikhathi esisele akutholakali.\n■ Uma usuvele usebenzise izinzuzo ze-Migo Plus (imisebenzi) ngaphezu kwesisodwa ngemva kokukhokha\n■ Uma isikhathi sesilingo samahhala siphela futhi inkokhelo ezenzakalelayo yenziwa ngokujwayelekile (ukukhansela ukukhokha okuzenzakalelayo akwanele)\n■ Uma i-akhawunti yakho imiswe unaphakade ngenxa yokwephulwa kwenqubomgomo yokusebenza",
    "z_4자동갱신결제취소구_344": "4. Khansela ukukhokha okuzenzakalelayo kokuvuselela (khansela ukubhalisa)",
    "z_MigoPlus는정_345": "I-Migo Plus iwumkhiqizo wokubhalisa. Ukuze ugweme izindleko ezingeziwe ngedethi yakho elandelayo yokukhokha, kufanele ugcwalise okuthi 'Khansela Ukubhalisa' kuzilungiselelo zedivayisi yakho (Isitolo Sohlelo Lokusebenza / Ukuphathwa Kokubhalisa Kwe-Google Play) okungenani amahora angu-24 ngaphambi kwedethi yakho yokukhokha ehleliwe. Ngisho noma ukhansela ukubhalisa kwakho, izinzuzo zesevisi yakho zizohlala kuze kube usuku lokugcina lwenkathi osuvele uyikhokhele.",
    "z_5미성년자결제취소_346": "5. Ukusulwa kwenkokhelo yezingane",
    "z_미성년자만19세미만_347": "Uma ingane (eneminyaka engaphansi kweyi-19) ikhokhela umkhiqizo okhokhelwayo ngaphandle kwemvume yommeleli wakhe osemthethweni, ingane noma ummeleli wakhe osemthethweni angakhansela inkokhelo. Nokho, okuhlukile kuyasebenza uma umuntu ophethe idivayisi yokukhokha engumuntu omdala noma uma ingane ikhohliswa ukuthi ikholelwe ukuthi ungumuntu omdala.",
    "z_환불신청및고객센터안_348": "Isicelo sokubuyiselwa imali nolwazi lwesikhungo samakhasimende",
    "z_요청양식이메일로결제_349": "Ifomu Lesicelo: Sithumele i-imeyili imininingwane yokukhokha (ikhophi yerisidi) nesizathu.",

    "z_Google로그인실_466": "Ukungena ngemvume kwe-Google kwehlulekile",
    "z_autoz환불정책및_467": "Inqubomgomo yembuyiselo nolwazi lomkhiqizo okhokhelwayo",
    "z_autozMigo는_468": "I-Migo ithobelana nemithetho neziqondiso ezifanele, okuhlanganisa Umthetho Wokuvikelwa Kwabathengi Ku-Electronic Commerce, njll., futhi isebenzisa imithetho yembuyiselo eklanyelwe izici zemikhiqizo yokuqukethwe kwedijithali.",
    "z_autoz1유료상품_469": "1. Intengo yomkhiqizo okhokhelwayo (Migo Plus).",
    "z_autoz1개월이용_470": "■ Ukudlula kwenyanga engu-1: KRW 14,900 / ngenyanga",
    "z_autoz3개월이용_471": "■ Ukudlula kwezinyanga ezi-3: KRW 29,000 / izinyanga ezi-3 (cishe u-KRW 9,600 ngenyanga)",
    "z_autoz12개월이_472": "■ Ukudlula kwezinyanga eziyi-12: KRW 89,000 / ngonyaka (cishe u-KRW 7,400 ngenyanga, isaphulelo esingu-50%)",
    "z_autoz최초결제시_473": "* Isivivinyo samahhala sosuku olungu-1 sinikezwa enkokhelweni yokuqala, futhi inkokhelo yenziwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngokuya ngomjikelezo omisiwe ngemva kokuphela kwesivivinyo samahhala.",
    "z_autoz모든가격은_474": "* Zonke izintengo zifaka phakathi intela ye-value added (VAT).",
    "z_autoz2청약철회_475": "2. Ukukhanselwa kokubhaliselwe kanye nenqubomgomo yembuyiselo (ukubuyiselwa kwemali okusemthethweni)",
    "z_autoz유료결제후_476": "Ngemva kokukhokha, ungacela ukukhansela (ukubuyiselwa imali okuphelele) zingakapheli izinsuku ezingu-7 kusukela ngedethi yokukhokha kulezi zimo ezilandelayo:\n■ Uma ungakaze usebenzise amasevisi akhokhelwayo (ukuthumela ukuthandwa okukhulu, ukusebenzisa izinto ezikhuthazayo, ukusebenzisa izihlungi ezithuthukisiwe, ukubuka ezinye izivakashi zephrofayela, njll.) ngemva kokukhokha.",
    "z_autoz3청약철회_477": "3. Izimo lapho ukukhanselwa kokubhalisa kukhawulelwe khona",
    "z_autoz디지털콘텐_478": "Ngenxa yemvelo yokuqukethwe kwedijithali, ukubuyiselwa kwemali okugcwele (ukukhansela okubhaliselwe) akunakwenzeka ezimweni ezilandelayo, futhi ngokomthetho, ukubuyiselwa kwemali okuyingxenye yesikhathi esisele akutholakali.\n■ Uma usuvele usebenzise izinzuzo ze-Migo Plus (imisebenzi) ngaphezu kwesisodwa ngemva kokukhokha\n■ Uma isikhathi sesilingo samahhala siphela futhi inkokhelo ezenzakalelayo yenziwa ngokujwayelekile (ukukhansela ukukhokha okuzenzakalelayo akwanele)\n■ Uma i-akhawunti yakho imiswe unaphakade ngenxa yokwephulwa kwenqubomgomo yokusebenza",
    "z_autoz4자동갱신_479": "4. Khansela ukukhokha okuzenzakalelayo kokuvuselela (khansela ukubhalisa)",
    "z_autozMigoP_480": "I-Migo Plus iwumkhiqizo wokubhalisa. Ukuze ugweme izindleko ezingeziwe ngedethi yakho elandelayo yokukhokha, kufanele ugcwalise okuthi 'Khansela Ukubhalisa' kuzilungiselelo zedivayisi yakho (Isitolo Sohlelo Lokusebenza / Ukuphathwa Kokubhalisa Kwe-Google Play) okungenani amahora angu-24 ngaphambi kwedethi yakho yokukhokha ehleliwe. Ngisho noma ukhansela ukubhalisa kwakho, izinzuzo zesevisi yakho zizohlala kuze kube usuku lokugcina lwenkathi osuvele uyikhokhele.",
    "z_autoz5미성년자_481": "5. Ukusulwa kwenkokhelo yezingane",
    "z_autoz미성년자만_482": "Uma ingane (eneminyaka engaphansi kweyi-19) ikhokhela umkhiqizo okhokhelwayo ngaphandle kwemvume yommeleli wakhe osemthethweni, ingane noma ummeleli wakhe osemthethweni angakhansela inkokhelo. Nokho, okuhlukile kuyasebenza uma umuntu ophethe idivayisi yokukhokha engumuntu omdala noma uma ingane ikhohliswa ukuthi ikholelwe ukuthi ungumuntu omdala.",
    "z_autoz환불신청및_483": "Isicelo sokubuyiselwa imali nolwazi lwesikhungo samakhasimende",
    "z_autoz요청양식이_484": "Ifomu Lesicelo: Sithumele i-imeyili imininingwane yokukhokha (ikhophi yerisidi) nesizathu.",
    "z_autoz이메일su_485": "I-imeyili: support@lunaticsgroup.com",

    "z_설치버튼을누르면완료_493": "Chofoza inkinobho yokufaka futhi usuqedile! Chofoza isithonjana se-Migo ukuze uqalise.",
    "z_구글플레이스토어에없_494": "Ingabe ayikho ku-Google Play Isitolo?",
    "z_현재내부테스트단계입_495": "Lokhu okwamanje kusesigabeni sokuhlola sangaphakathi. Izobhaliswa ku-Google Play Isitolo lapho ikhishwa ngokusemthethweni.",

    "z_autozautoz_379": "Isithombe sokuqala sisetshenziswa njengesithombe esimele. Uma unesithombe, uthola okufanayo okungu-30% ngaphezulu!",
    "z_autozautoz_380": "umugqa owodwa isingeniso",
    "z_autozautoz_381": "Yikuphi ukuzizwisa okufunayo lapho uhamba? 🌏",
    "z_autozautoz_382": "isitayela sokuhamba",
    "z_autozautoz_383": "(izinketho eziningi)",
    "z_autozautoz_384": "ulimi olukhulunywayo",
    "z_autozautoz_385": "Indawo yentshisekelo",
    "z_소셜로그인에러_386": "iphutha lokungena komphakathi",
    "z_autozautoz_387": "Inqubomgomo yembuyiselo nolwazi lomkhiqizo okhokhelwayo",
    "z_autozautoz_388": "I-Migo ithobelana nemithetho neziqondiso ezifanele, okuhlanganisa Umthetho Wokuvikelwa Kwabathengi Ku-Electronic Commerce, njll., futhi isebenzisa imithetho yembuyiselo eklanyelwe izici zemikhiqizo yokuqukethwe kwedijithali.",
    "z_autozautoz_389": "1. Intengo yomkhiqizo okhokhelwayo (Migo Plus).",
    "z_autozautoz_390": "■ Ukudlula kwenyanga engu-1: KRW 14,900 / ngenyanga",
    "z_autozautoz_391": "■ Ukudlula kwezinyanga ezi-3: KRW 29,000 / izinyanga ezi-3 (cishe u-KRW 9,600 ngenyanga)",
    "z_autozautoz_392": "■ Ukudlula kwezinyanga eziyi-12: KRW 89,000 / ngonyaka (cishe u-KRW 7,400 ngenyanga, isaphulelo esingu-50%)",
    "z_autozautoz_393": "* Isivivinyo samahhala sosuku olungu-1 sinikezwa enkokhelweni yokuqala, futhi inkokhelo yenziwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngokuya ngomjikelezo omisiwe ngemva kokuphela kwesivivinyo samahhala.",
    "z_autozautoz_394": "* Zonke izintengo zifaka phakathi intela ye-value added (VAT).",
    "z_autozautoz_395": "2. Ukukhanselwa kokubhaliselwe kanye nenqubomgomo yembuyiselo (ukubuyiselwa kwemali okusemthethweni)",
    "z_autozautoz_396": "Ngemva kokukhokha, ungacela ukukhansela (ukubuyiselwa imali okuphelele) zingakapheli izinsuku ezingu-7 kusukela ngedethi yokukhokha kulezi zimo ezilandelayo:\n■ Uma ungakaze usebenzise amasevisi akhokhelwayo (ukuthumela ukuthandwa okukhulu, ukusebenzisa izinto ezikhuthazayo, ukusebenzisa izihlungi ezithuthukisiwe, ukubuka ezinye izivakashi zephrofayela, njll.) ngemva kokukhokha.",
    "z_autozautoz_397": "3. Izimo lapho ukukhanselwa kokubhalisa kukhawulelwe khona",
    "z_autozautoz_398": "Ngenxa yemvelo yokuqukethwe kwedijithali, ukubuyiselwa kwemali okugcwele (ukukhansela okubhaliselwe) akunakwenzeka ezimweni ezilandelayo, futhi ngokomthetho, ukubuyiselwa kwemali okuyingxenye yesikhathi esisele akutholakali.\n■ Uma usuvele usebenzise izinzuzo ze-Migo Plus (imisebenzi) ngaphezu kwesisodwa ngemva kokukhokha\n■ Uma isikhathi sesilingo samahhala siphela futhi inkokhelo ezenzakalelayo yenziwa ngokujwayelekile (ukukhansela ukukhokha okuzenzakalelayo akwanele)\n■ Uma i-akhawunti yakho imiswe unaphakade ngenxa yokwephulwa kwenqubomgomo yokusebenza",
    "z_autozautoz_399": "4. Khansela ukukhokha okuzenzakalelayo kokuvuselela (khansela ukubhalisa)",
    "z_autozautoz_400": "5. Ukusulwa kwenkokhelo yezingane",
    "z_autozautoz_401": "Uma ingane (eneminyaka engaphansi kweyi-19) ikhokhela umkhiqizo okhokhelwayo ngaphandle kwemvume yommeleli wakhe osemthethweni, ingane noma ummeleli wakhe osemthethweni angakhansela inkokhelo. Nokho, okuhlukile kuyasebenza uma umuntu ophethe idivayisi yokukhokha engumuntu omdala noma uma ingane ikhohliswa ukuthi ikholelwe ukuthi ungumuntu omdala.",
    "z_autozautoz_402": "Isicelo sokubuyiselwa imali nolwazi lwesikhungo samakhasimende",
    "z_autozautoz_403": "Ifomu Lesicelo: Sithumele i-imeyili imininingwane yokukhokha (ikhophi yerisidi) nesizathu.",
    "z_autozautoz_404": "I-imeyili: support@lunaticsgroup.com",
    "z_autozAPK다운_405": "Landa i-APK",
    "z_autoz아래버튼을_406": "Chofoza inkinobho engezansi ukuze ulande ifayela le-Migo APK.",
    "z_autoz알수없는앱_407": "Vumela ukufakwa kwezinhlelo zokusebenza ezingaziwa",
    "z_autoz설정보안알_408": "Khetha Izilungiselelo → Ukuphepha → ‘Imithombo Engaziwa’ noma ‘Vumela lo mthombo’ lapho usebenzisa amafayela alandiwe.",
    "z_autozAPK파일_409": "Qalisa ifayela le-APK",
    "z_autoz다운로드된_410": "Vula ifayela elilandiwe (uhlelo lokusebenza lwamafayela / Amafayela Ami) bese ucindezela i-migo-latest.apk ukuze uyifake.",
    "z_autoz설치완료실_411": "Ukufaka kuqedile futhi kuyasebenza",
    "z_autoz설치버튼을_412": "Chofoza inkinobho yokufaka futhi usuqedile! Chofoza isithonjana se-Migo ukuze uqalise.",
    "z_autoz구글플레이_413": "Ingabe ayikho ku-Google Play Isitolo?",
    "z_autoz현재내부테_414": "Lokhu okwamanje kusesigabeni sokuhlola sangaphakathi. Izobhaliswa ku-Google Play Isitolo lapho ikhishwa ngokusemthethweni.",
    "z_autoz알수없는앱_415": "Kuvela isexwayiso 'sohlelo lokusebenza olungaziwa'.",
    "z_autozPlayS_416": "Isexwayiso sokuvikela se-Android sivela uma ufaka i-APK ngaphandle kwe-Google Play Isitolo. Chofoza okuthi ‘Qhubeka’ ukuze ufake. I-Migo uhlelo lokusebenza oluphephile.",

  "guide.match.like.label": "Kuhle",

  "guide.match.superlike.label": "super like",
  "guide.match.superlike.desc": "Ungathumela i-Super Like enomlayezo okhethekile usebenzisa inkinobho yenkanyezi.Kukhanga kakhulu komunye umuntu.",
  "guide.match.boost.label": "thuthukisa",

  "guide.match.checkin.label": "Ukungena nge-GPS",

  "guide.match.mission.label": "inhloso yanamuhla",
  "guide.match.mission.desc": "Ukusetha injongo yakho yokuhamba yosuku (izindawo zokudlela, ukubuka indawo, amaphathi, njll.) kuzokusiza ukuthi uxhumane kangcono nabahambi abanemigomo efanayo.",
  "guide.match.notif.label": "isaziso",

  "guide.match.filter.label": "isihlungi",
  "guide.match.filter.desc": "Ungahlunga ngeminyaka, ubulili, ibanga, i-MBTI, isitayela sokuvakasha, njll. usebenzisa isithonjana sesihlungi phezulu.",
  "guide.discover.title": "🧭 Ungasisebenzisa kanjani isikrini sokuzulazula",
  "guide.discover.subtitle": "Hlola amaqembu okuvakasha, okuphakelayo komphakathi, nemihlangano ebukhoma yombani!",
  "guide.discover.groups.label": "iqembu lokuhamba",
  "guide.discover.groups.desc": "Thola futhi ufake isicelo seqembu labavakashi elifana nendawo oya kuyo, idethi, nesitayela.",
  "guide.discover.feed.label": "okuphakelayo",
  "guide.discover.feed.desc": "Jabulela ukuskrola ezithombeni zokuhamba zesikhathi sangempela kanye nokubuyekezwa okuvela kwabanye abahambi.",
  "guide.discover.lightning.label": "umhlangano wombani",

  "guide.discover.create.label": "Dala iqembu",
  "guide.discover.create.desc": "Dala iqembu lakho lokuvakasha usebenzisa inkinobho ethi + ngezansi kwesokudla.",
  "guide.discover.like.label": "Njengokuphakelayo",
  "guide.discover.like.desc": "Ungathanda okuthunyelwe okuthandayo ngokuchofoza inkinobho yenhliziyo.",
  "guide.discover.comment.label": "phawula",
  "guide.discover.comment.desc": "Xhumana nabahambi ngokushiya amazwana kokuthunyelwe.",
  "guide.map.title": "📍 Ungasisebenzisa kanjani isikrini semephu",
  "guide.map.subtitle": "Hlola abahambi abaseduze, izindawo ezishisayo, nemibuthano kumephu ngesikhathi sangempela!",
  "guide.map.travelers.label": "isihambi esiseduze",
  "guide.map.travelers.desc": "Kuthebhu 'Izihambi' ezansi, ungabona izihambi eziseduze okwamanje kumephu.",
  "guide.map.hotplace.label": "Hlola izindawo ezishisayo",
  "guide.map.hotplace.desc": "Kuthebhu 'Izindawo Ezishisayo', hlola izindawo ezidumile eziseduze ngezigaba ezifana namakilabhu, izindawo ezihehayo, nezindawo zokudlela.",
  "guide.map.groups.label": "ukubuthana nxazonke",
  "guide.map.groups.desc": "Kuthebhu 'Yemihlangano', hlola imephu ngemihlangano yombani eyenzeka eduze nawe bese uyijoyina.",
  "guide.map.community.label": "okuphakelayo kwendawo",

  "guide.map.restaurants.label": "Izindawo zokudlela eziseduze",

  "guide.map.realtime.label": "Izaziso zesikhathi sangempela",
  "guide.map.realtime.desc": "Uzothola isaziso esizivelelayo lapho kuvela isivakashi esisha noma umhlangano uba khona eduze.",
  "guide.chat.title": "💬 Ungasisebenzisa kanjani isikrini sokuxoxa",
  "guide.chat.subtitle": "Xoxa nabahambi abafanisiwe futhi wenze i-aphoyintimenti!",
  "guide.chat.threads.label": "uhlu lwengxoxo",
  "guide.chat.threads.desc": "Uhlu lwezingxoxo nabahambi abafanayo luzovela lapha.Thepha ukuze uye ewindini lengxoxo.",
  "guide.chat.schedule.label": "Yabelana ngekhalenda",
  "guide.chat.schedule.desc": "Ungakwazi ukwabelana ngekhadi leshejuli elifaka idethi nendawo kusukela kunkinobho ethi + ezansi kwewindi lengxoxo.",
  "guide.chat.meet.label": "isiphakamiso somhlangano",
  "guide.chat.meet.desc": "Phakamisa ngokusemthethweni usuku lwangempela lomhlangano nendawo usebenzisa inkinobho yesiphakamiso somhlangano.",
  "guide.chat.safe.label": "umhlangano ophephile",
  "guide.chat.safe.desc": "Ungahlangabezana nokuthula kwengqondo ngohlu lokuhlola ngaphambi komhlangano kanye nesistimu yokuphepha.",
  "guide.chat.review.label": "Isibuyekezo somhlangano",
  "guide.chat.review.desc": "Uma ushiya isibuyekezo mayelana nomunye umuntu ngemva komhlangano, isikolo sakho sokuthemba sizokhula.",
  "guide.profile.title": "✨ Ungasisebenzisa kanjani isikrini sephrofayili",
  "guide.profile.subtitle": "Qedela iphrofayela yakho futhi uphathe izilungiselelo zakho!",
  "guide.profile.edit.label": "Hlela iphrofayela",

  "guide.profile.safety.label": "uhlelo lokuphepha",

  "guide.profile.trips.label": "uhambo lwami",

  "auto.g_0784": "Ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuzinza kwesevisi, yonke idatha yendawo yesikhathi esisodwa (GPS) eqoqwe ayihlonzwa unomphela (NULL) ngumhleli ozenzakalelayo ongemuva (Cron) amahora angu-24 ngemva kokufinyelela kokugcina.",

  "auto.g_0786": "Lapho ilungu lihoxa, irekhodi le-akhawunti eliphezulu liyasuswa futhi yonke idatha etholiwe njengephrofayela, umlando ofanayo, imilayezo yegumbi lengxoxo, nomlando wokukhokha kuyasuswa.",

  "auto.g_0792": "Uma usebenzisa amasevisi ethu, siqoqa ulwazi olulandelayo:",
  "auto.g_0793": "Izinto ezidingekayo:",
  "auto.g_0794": "Ikheli le-imeyili, iphasiwedi (isitoreji esibethelwe), isiteketiso, usuku lokuzalwa (ukuqinisekisa ubudala), ubulili",
  "auto.g_0795": "Izinto ozikhethela zona:",
  "auto.g_0796": "Isithombe sephrofayela, ukuzethula, indawo yokuvakasha, ubuzwe, i-MBTI, umaka wokuvakasha",
  "auto.g_0797": "Ulwazi lwendawo:",
  "auto.g_0798": "Indawo ngenkathi usebenzisa uhlelo lokusebenza (izixhumanisi ze-GPS) — iboniswa kuphela kubahambi abaseduze, isuswa ngokushesha lapho uphuma",
  "auto.g_0799": "Ukungena ngemvume komphakathi:",
  "auto.g_0800": "I-imeyili negama lapho uxhumanisa i-akhawunti ye-Google/Apple (iphasiwedi ayiqoqiwe)",
  "auto.g_0801": "Ulwazi lokufakazela ubuqiniso:",
  "auto.g_0802": "Isithombe se-ID (sisuswe ngokushesha ngemva kokuqedwa kokuqinisekisa), inombolo yocingo",
  "auto.g_0803": "Ulwazi lwedivayisi:",
  "auto.g_0804": "I-ID yedivayisi, inguqulo ye-OS, inguqulo yohlelo lokusebenza, ithokheni yokuphusha",
  "auto.g_0805": "Umlando wokusetshenziswa:",
  "auto.g_0806": "Isikhathi sokusebenzisa isevisi, umlando ofanayo, imilayezo yengxoxo",

  "auto.g_0821": "Iminyaka emi-5 (Umthetho Wezohwebo Ngogesi)",
  "auto.g_0822": "Ukuqinisekisa ubuwena",
  "auto.g_0823": "Isithombe se-ID",
  "auto.g_0824": "Isuswe ngokushesha ngemva kokuqedwa kokuqinisekisa",
  "auto.g_0825": "push isaziso",
  "auto.g_0826": "I-ID yedivayisi, ithokheni yokuphusha",
  "auto.g_0827": "Izaziso zize zikhutshazwe",
  "auto.g_0881": "3. Ukuhlinzekwa kolwazi lomuntu siqu kubantu besithathu",
  "auto.g_0828": "Empeleni, inkampani ayinikezi ulwazi lomuntu siqu lwabasebenzisi kubantu besithathu.Nokho, kukhona okuhlukile kulezi zimo ezilandelayo:",
  "auto.g_0829": "Uma umsebenzisi enikeze imvume esobala kusengaphambili",
  "auto.g_0830": "Ezimeni ngokuhambisana nemithetho neziqondiso (izimvume ezisemthethweni ezivela ezikhungweni eziphenyayo, njll.)",
  "auto.g_0831": "Ukuphathiswa kwebhizinisi kanye nezinsizakalo zezinkampani zangaphandle:",
  "auto.g_0832": "I-Supabase (USA)",
  "auto.g_0833": "- Isizindalwazi/Iseva Yokuqinisekisa",
  "auto.g_0834": "I-Apple Push Notifications (US)",
  "auto.g_0835": "- Push izaziso",
  "auto.g_0836": "I-Google (USA)",
  "auto.g_0837": "- I-Social Login, i-Maps API",
  "auto.g_0838": "I-OpenAI (USA)",
  "auto.g_0839": "- Isici sohambo lwe-AI",
  "auto.g_0840": "Ama-trustee angenhla afinyelela kuphela inani elincane ledatha ngenjongo yokuhlinzeka ngamasevisi.",
  "auto.g_0882": "4. Ukulandelela Isikhangiso (Ukungafihli Kokulandelela Uhlelo Lokusebenza — ATT)",
  "auto.g_0841": "Ngokuvumelana nenqubomgomo ye-Apple's App Tracking Transparency (ATT), imvume yokulandelela isikhangiso (IDFA) ingase icelwe ngokuhlukile ekuqalisweni kokuqala kohlelo lokusebenza ngemva kokufakwa.",
  "auto.g_0842": "Ngisho noma ungavumelani, usengasebenzisa zonke izici ezibalulekile zohlelo lokusebenza.",
  "auto.g_0843": "Hoxisa imvume: Ungakushintsha lokhu noma nini kuzilungiselelo ze-iOS → Ubumfihlo Nokuphepha → Ukulandelela.",
  "auto.g_0883": "5. Ulwazi lomuntu siqu oluhlobene nezinkokhelo zangaphakathi nohlelo nokubhaliselwe",
  "auto.g_0844": "Izinkokhelo zokubhaliselwe kwe-Migo Plus / Premium zicutshungulwa ngohlelo lwe-Apple's In-App Payment (IAP).Inkampani ayizigcini izinombolo zekhadi lesikweletu ngokuqondile, futhi izingxabano zokukhokha zingaphansi kwezinqubomgomo ze-App Store.",
  "auto.g_0845": "Khansela ukubhalisa: Kutholakala kuzilungiselelo ze-iOS → I-Apple ID → Okubhaliselwe.",
  "auto.g_0884": "6. Izinyathelo zokuvikela imininingwane yomuntu",
  "auto.g_0846": "Konke ukuxhumana: ukubethela kwe-SSL/TLS",
  "auto.g_0847": "Iphasiwedi: Londoloza i-bcrypt hash (umbhalo wangempela awulondoloziwe)",
  "auto.g_0848": "Ukuqinisekiswa okususelwe kumathokheni e-JWT, kulahlwa ngokuzenzakalelayo lapho kuphelelwa yisikhathi",
  "auto.g_0849": "Sebenzisa isizindalwazi Sokuphepha Kwezinga Lomugqa (RLS)",
  "auto.g_0850": "Ukusebenzisa umgomo welungelo elincane lokunciphisa ukufinyelela okungadingekile kulwazi lomuntu siqu",
  "auto.g_0885": "7. Izinqubo nezindlela zokucekela phansi imininingwane yomuntu",
  "auto.g_0851": "Lapho ukhansela ubulungu:",
  "auto.g_0852": "Inqubomgomo ye-CASCADE DELETE izobangela ukuthi idatha elandelayo isuswe ngokushesha futhi unomphela (ingenakutholwa):",
  "auto.g_0853": "Ulwazi lwephrofayela (igama, isithombe, usuku lokuzalwa, njll.)",
  "auto.g_0854": "Ulwazi lwendawo nomlando ofanayo",
  "auto.g_0855": "Izingosi zezingxoxo nayo yonke imilayezo",
  "auto.g_0856": "Ulwazi lokubhalisa nolwazi lokukhokha (ngaphandle kwezikhathi ezisemthethweni zokugcinwa)",
  "auto.g_0857": "Kodwa-ke, ngokuhambisana ne-Electronic Commerce Act, amarekhodi okukhokha agcinwa iminyaka emi-5 bese ebhujiswa.",
  "auto.g_0858": "8. Ukuvikelwa Kobumfihlo Bezingane (COPPA)",
  "auto.g_0859": "⚠️ I-Migo ayihloselwe abasebenzisi abangaphansi kweminyaka engu-18 ubudala.",
  "auto.g_0860": "Iminyaka yakho yobudala izoqinisekiswa uma ubhalisa, futhi uma uqinisekisiwe ukuthi ungumntwana, i-akhawunti yakho izosuswa ngokushesha.Asiqoqi ngamabomu ulwazi lomuntu siqu ezinganeni ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-13 (ukuthobela i-COPPA).",
  "auto.g_0861": "9. Amalungelo Omsebenzisi we-EU/EEA (GDPR)",
  "auto.g_0862": "Uma uyisakhamuzi sase-European Economic Area (EEA), unamalungelo alandelayo ngaphansi kwe-GDPR:",
  "auto.g_0863": "Ilungelo lokuhoxisa imvume yokucubungula ulwazi lomuntu siqu",
  "auto.g_0864": "Ilungelo lokufinyelela ulwazi (isicelo sokubuka imininingwane yomuntu siqu siphethwe)",
  "auto.g_0865": "Ilungelo lokulungiswa (isicelo sokulungiswa kolwazi olungalungile)",
  "auto.g_0866": "Ilungelo lokusula (ilungelo lokukhohlwa)",
  "auto.g_0867": "Ilungelo lokuvinjelwa kokucubungula",
  "auto.g_0868": "Ilungelo lokuphatheka kwedatha",
  "auto.g_0869": "Sebenzisa amalungelo akho:",
  "auto.g_0870": "Uma wenza isicelo, sizocutshungulwa phakathi kwezinsuku ezingu-30.",
  "auto.g_0886": "10. Umphathi wokuvikela imininingwane yomuntu kanye nemibuzo",
  "auto.g_0871": "Igama Lenkampani:",
  "auto.g_0872": "Isikhulu sokuvikela imininingwane yomuntu:",
  "auto.g_0873": "I-Woojin Song (CEO)",
  "auto.g_0874": "I-imeyili:",
  "auto.g_0875": "Ukwesekwa Kwamakhasimende:",
  "auto.g_0876": "Sicela uthumele izikhalazo mayelana nolwazi lomuntu siqu ekhelini le-imeyili elingenhla.Uma uphakamisa ukuphikisa okusemthethweni, sizokusingatha ngokushesha.",
  "auto.g_0877": "Le nqubomgomo isebenza kusukela ngomhla ka-2 Ephreli 2026.",
  "auto.g_0878": "Noma yiziphi izinguquko zizokwaziswa ezinsukwini ezingu-7 kusengaphambili ngesaziso sangaphakathi nohlelo noma nge-imeyili.",

  "auto.g_0975": "kuqala",
  "auto.g_0976": "UJoe",
  "auto.g_0977": "Imigomo Yokusebenzisa",
  "auto.g_0978": "Imigomo Yesevisi ye-Migo",
  "auto.g_1034": "inhloso",
  "auto.g_0980": "Injongo yale migomo nemibandela iwukubeka imibandela nezinqubo zokusebenzisa amasevisi e-Migo, namalungelo nezibopho phakathi kwenkampani nabasebenzisi.",
  "auto.g_1035": "Iziqu zomsebenzisi nemikhawulo yobudala",
  "auto.g_0981": "⚠️ Ukukhawulelwa kweminyaka: Kutholakala kuphela kulabo abaneminyaka engu-18 noma ngaphezulu.",
  "auto.g_0982": "Intsha engaphansi kweminyaka engu-18 ayikwazi ukusebenzisa isevisi ngaphandle kwemvume yommeleli wayo osemthethweni.",
  "auto.g_0983": "Inkampani ingase icele ukuqinisekiswa kobunikazi ukuze iqinisekise ubudala bomsebenzisi.",
  "auto.g_0984": "Uma uqinisekisiwe ukuthi ungumntwana, i-akhawunti yakho ingase isuswe ngokushesha ngaphandle kwesaziso sangaphambili.",
  "auto.g_1036": "Ukubhaliswa nokuphathwa kwe-akhawunti",
  "auto.g_0985": "Abasebenzisi kufanele babhalise ngegama labo langempela nolwazi lwangempela.Ukunikeza ulwazi olungamanga kungase kuphumele ekususweni kwe-akhawunti kanye nesibopho sezomthetho.",
  "auto.g_0986": "Unesibopho sayo yonke imisebenzi engaphakathi kwe-akhawunti yakho.",
  "auto.g_0987": "Kufanele uphathe iphasiwedi yakho ngendlela efanele futhi ungase ungakwazi ukwabelana ngayo nabanye.",
  "auto.g_0988": "Uma uthola noma yikuphi ukwebiwa kwe-akhawunti noma ukufinyelela okungagunyaziwe, kufanele ukubike ngokushesha eNkampanini.",
  "auto.g_1037": "Okuqukethwe kwesevisi",
  "auto.g_0989": "Inkampani inikeza lezi zinsizakalo ezilandelayo:",
  "auto.g_0990": "Isevisi yokufanisa abahambi esekelwe endaweni (Sway, Like, Superlike)",
  "auto.g_0991": "Ingxoxo yesikhathi sangempela kanye nemiyalezo engu-1:1",
  "auto.g_0992": "Dala futhi ujoyine amaqembu okuvakasha",
  "auto.g_0993": "Umphakathi wezokuvakasha (ibhodi lezaziso, ukuphawula)",
  "auto.g_0994": "Hlola abahambi abaseduze (Eduze)",
  "auto.g_0995": "Izindlela zohambo namakhalenda",
  "auto.g_0996": "Isevisi yokubhalisa ye-Migo Plus/Premium",
  "auto.g_1038": "isenzo esinqatshelwe",
  "auto.g_0997": "Izenzo ezilandelayo zinqatshelwe ngokuphelele:",
  "auto.g_0998": "UGAXEKILE, ULWAZI LWAMANGA, KANYE NOMKHOHLELI",
  "auto.g_0999": "Ukuhlukumeza abanye, inkulumo enenzondo, izinsongo, ukucupha",
  "auto.g_1000": "Ukuthumela okuqukethwe okungekho emthethweni (izinto zokuxhaphaza izingane ngokocansi, njll.)",
  "auto.g_1001": "Thumela okuqukethwe okululaza ucansi",
  "auto.g_1002": "Isicelo semali ngezinhloso zokukhwabanisa",
  "auto.g_1003": "Zama Ukuxhumana Nomncane",
  "auto.g_1004": "Ukugebenga noma ukuzama ukufinyelela isistimu yesevisi",
  "auto.g_1005": "Ukuqoqwa okungagunyaziwe nokwabelana ngolwazi lomuntu siqu lwabanye abantu",
  "auto.g_1006": "Ukusetshenziswa okungagunyaziwe ngezinjongo zokukhangisa",
  "auto.g_1007": "Ukweba i-akhawunti yomunye umuntu noma ukusebenzisa ubunikazi obungamanga",
  "auto.g_1008": "Ukwephulwa komthetho kungase kubangele ukumiswa kwe-akhawunti unomphela kanye nesinyathelo somthetho ngaphandle kwesixwayiso sangaphambili.",
  "auto.g_1039": "Okuqukethwe kanye namalungelo empahla yengqondo",
  "auto.g_1009": "I-copyright yokuqukethwe njengezithombe nombhalo olayishwe umsebenzisi ingeyomsebenzisi.",
  "auto.g_1010": "Kodwa-ke, umsebenzisi unikeza inkampani ilayisensi engakhethekile yokusebenzisa okuqukethwe ngezinga elidingekayo ekusebenzeni kwesevisi.",
  "auto.g_1011": "Amalungelo empahla yengqondo yohlelo lokusebenza lwe-Migo, ilogo, idizayini, ikhodi, njll.ngawenkampani.",
  "auto.g_1040": "Amasevisi akhokhelwayo kanye nenqubomgomo yembuyiselo",
  "auto.g_1012": "Izinhlelo zokubhaliselwe:",
  "auto.g_1013": "• I-Migo Plus: ₩9,900 ngenyanga / ₩79,200 ngonyaka",
  "auto.g_1014": "• I-Migo Premium: ₩19,900 ngenyanga / ₩159,200 ngonyaka",
  "auto.g_1015": "Zonke izinkokhelo zicutshungulwa nge-Apple In-App Purchases (IAP).",
  "auto.g_1016": "Ukubhalisa kuvuselelwa ngokuzenzakalela ngaphandle kokuthi kukhanselwe okungenani amahora angama-24 ngaphambi kosuku lokuvuselela.",
  "auto.g_1017": "Inqubomgomo Yokubuyisela Imali:",
  "auto.g_1018": "Landela inqubomgomo yembuyiselo ye-Apple App Store.Imbuyiselo ingu",
  "auto.g_1019": "Sicela ufake isicelo nge-.",
  "auto.g_1020": "Khansela ukubhalisa: Izilungiselelo ze-iOS >I-ID ye-Apple >Itholakala ngokubhalisile.",
  "auto.g_1021": "Ngenxa yemvelo yokuqukethwe kwedijithali (imikhiqizo esebenzisekayo efana ne-Boost and Superlikes), kungase kube nzima ukubuyisela izinto ezisetshenzisiwe.",
  "auto.g_1041": "Izinguquko zesevisi neziphazamiso",
  "auto.g_1022": "Inkampani ingase iguqule noma inqamule isevisi, futhi izokwazisa ezinsukwini ezingu-30 kusengaphambili ngesaziso sangaphakathi nohlelo noma i-imeyili.",
  "auto.g_1023": "Ezimweni ezingagwemeki njengamapeshi okuvikela ezimeni eziphuthumayo, ingase imiswe okwesikhashana ngaphandle kwesaziso sangaphambili.",
  "auto.g_1042": "Umshwana wokuzihlangula",
  "auto.g_1024": "I-Migo iyinkundla yokuxhumanisa umhambi kuya kumhambi futhi ayinasibopho ngokuqondile ngezingxabano, izingozi, noma ukuthengiselana kwezezimali okwenzeka phakathi kwabasebenzisi.",
  "auto.g_1025": "Sicela unake ukuphepha komuntu siqu ngaphambi kokuhlangana ungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi, njengokukhetha indawo yomphakathi nokwabelana ngohlelo lwakho nabantu obajwayele.",
  "auto.g_1026": "Inkampani ikhawulela isibopho sezomthetho sokulahleka kwedatha kanye nokulahlekelwa kwebhizinisi okutholwe ngenkathi kusetshenziswa Isevisi ngezinga elivunyelwe umthetho.",
  "auto.g_1043": "Ukuxazululwa Kwezingxabano kanye Nomthetho Olawulayo",
  "auto.g_1027": "Le Migomo Nemibandela izohunyushwa ngokuhambisana nemithetho yeRiphabhulikhi yase-Korea.",
  "auto.g_1028": "Izingxabano ezihlobene nokusetshenziswa kwesevisi zizobuswa yiNkantolo Yesifunda SaseSeoul Emaphakathi.",
  "auto.g_1029": "Kubasebenzisi baphesheya kwezilwandle, imithetho yendawo ingase ize kuqala.",
  "auto.g_1030": "Xhumana nathi",
  "auto.g_1031": "Ngemibuzo mayelana Nemibandela Yokusebenzisa:",
  "auto.g_1032": "I-Lunatics Group Inc.|Omele: Ingoma Woojin",
  "auto.g_1033": "Le migomo nemibandela iyasebenza kusukela ngomhla ka-2 Ephreli 2026.",

  "auto.g_1420": "isiginci",
  "auto.g_1421": "ubuzwe",
  "auto.g_1422": "iphasiwedi",
  "auto.g_1423": "8 noma ngaphezulu inhlanganisela yezinhlamvu/inombolo",
  "auto.g_1424": "Amaphasiwedi akho awafani.",
  "auto.g_1425": "Ungayenza iphephe kakhudlwana ngokuxuba izinhlamvu zesiNgisi, izinombolo, nezinhlamvu ezikhethekile.",
  "auto.g_1426": "inombolo yeselula",
  "auto.g_1427": "Inombolo yokuqinisekisa (amadijithi ayi-6)",
  "auto.g_1428": "Ukuqinisekisa inombolo yocingo",
  "auto.g_1429": "Kuqinisekisiwe",
  "auto.g_1430": "Ngiyavumelana nayo yonke imigomo nemibandela engezansi",
  "auto.g_1431": "Izingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-18 azikwazi ukujoyina.",
  "auto.g_1432": "Ilungu Eliqinisekisiwe Lobunikazi",
  "auto.g_1433": "Siqinisa izinqubomgomo zethu zokuphepha ukuze siqinisekise ukusetshenziswa okuphephile.",
  "auto.g_1434": "isithombe sephrofayili",
  "auto.g_1435": "okudingekayo",
  "auto.g_1436": "isahluko",
  "auto.g_1437": "ummeleli",
  "auto.g_1438": "engeza isithombe",
  "auto.g_1439": "Beka isithombe sakho esihle njengesithombe sokuqala esiyinhloko.",
  "auto.g_1440": "umugqa owodwa isingeniso",
  "auto.g_1441": "Sicela ushiye isingeniso esifushane esibonisa izintelezi zakho!",
  "auto.g_1442": "indlela yami yokuhamba",
  "auto.g_1443": "(ukukhetha okuningi kungenzeka)",
  "auto.g_1444": "Izilimi ezitholakalayo",
  "auto.g_1445": "Indawo yentshisekelo",
  "auto.g_1446": "Inqubomgomo yembuyiselo nolwazi lokusebenzisa isevisi ekhokhelwayo",
  "auto.g_1447": "Izingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-18 azikwazi ukujoyina.",
  "auto.g_1448": "1. Ulwazi lwethikithi le-Premium",
  "auto.g_1449": "Uhlelo oluyisisekelo lwenyanga engu-1: ₩35,000 / ngenyanga",
  "auto.g_1450": "Uhlelo olujwayelekile lwezinyanga ezi-3: ₩89,000",
  "auto.g_1451": "Uhlelo lonyaka lwezinyanga eziyi-12: ₩250,000",
  "auto.g_1452": "Uma ukhokhela ukubhalisa, inkokhelo ikhokhiswa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngesikhathi esimisiwe.",
  "auto.g_1453": "Intengo engenhla ihlanganisa intela ye-value added (VAT).",
  "auto.g_1454": "2. Inqubomgomo yokubuyiselwa kwemali nokukhansela (ngaphambi kokusetshenziswa)",
  "auto.g_1455": "Uma ungazange usebenzise noma iyiphi inzuzo efanayo noma izimpahla ezikhokhelwe ngemva kokukhokha, imbuyiselo ephelele kungenzeka zingakapheli izinsuku ezingu-7 kusukela ngosuku lokukhokha.",
  "auto.g_1456": "3. Inqubomgomo engabuyiswa (ngemuva kokusetshenziswa)",
  "auto.g_1457": "Uma ususisebenzisile kakade isici sokuswayipha se-premium noma sekudlule izinsuku ezingaphezu kwezingu-7 kusukela ukukhokha, imbuyiselo yakho ingase yenqatshwe.",
  "auto.g_1458": "4. Isimo sokubhalisa kanye nezinkokhelo ezizenzakalelayo",
  "auto.g_1459": "Ngisho noma ukhansela inkokhelo ezenzekelayo, ukubhalisa kwakho kuzoqhubeka njengokujwayelekile esikhathini esikhokhelwayo samanje.",
  "auto.g_1460": "5. Imithetho mayelana nabameleli bezomthetho bezingane",
  "auto.g_1461": "Izinkokhelo ezenziwe izingane ngaphandle kwemvume yomzali noma omunye ummeleli osemthethweni zizobuyiselwa imali ngokugcwele ngemva kokuqinisekiswa.",
  "auto.g_1462": "Ngezicelo zokubuyiselwa imali neminye imibuzo,",
  "auto.g_1463": "[Isikhungo Sekhasimende] imenyu ngaphakathi kohlelo lokusebenza noma",
  "auto.g_1464": "Sicela uthinte support@lunaticsgroup.com.",

  "privacy.sensitive.note": "Njengohlelo lokusebenza lokufanisa komphakathi, i-Migo ingase iqoqe ulwazi olubucayi olunjengokukhetha kwezocansi, inkolo, nemibono yepolitiki efakwe ngokuzithandela ngabasebenzisi.Lokhu kusetshenziselwa kuphela ukuthuthukisa i-algorithm efanayo futhi ayithengiswa noma kwabelwane ngayo nezinkampani zangaphandle.",
  "privacy.s3.intro": "Inkampani ibeka idatha encane kumaphrosesa alandelayo ukuze asebenze.Abacubunguli abakwazi ukusebenzisa idatha engaphezu kwenjongo ephathisiwe noma bathengisele futhi izinkampani zangaphandle.",

source:
export const MAP_LOCALES: Record<string, any> = {
  ko: {
    "common.cancel": "취소",
    "common.deny": "거절",
    "hotplace.cancelSeeker": "취소",
    "hotplace.defaultDesc": "함께 여행할 동반자를 찾고 있어요 😊",
    "hotplace.emptyDesc": "먼저 동반자를 구해보세요!\n누군가가 곧 함께하고 싶어할 거예요 😊",
    "hotplace.emptyTitle": "아직 모집 중인 사람이 없어요",
    "hotplace.joinBtn": "함께 가요!",
    "hotplace.joinDesc": "그룹이 만들어졌어요. 채팅에서 확인하세요.",
    "hotplace.joinFail": "신청 실패",
    "hotplace.joinNotifTitle": "동반자 신청이 왔어요! 🎉",
    "hotplace.joinSuccess": "🎉 함께 가기 신청 완료!",
    "hotplace.maxMembersLabel": "모집 인원",
    "hotplace.meetDateLabel": "날짜 (선택)",
    "hotplace.meetTimeLabel": "시간 (선택)",
    "hotplace.membersUnit": "명",
    "hotplace.msgLabel": "한마디 메시지 (선택)",
    "hotplace.msgPlaceholder": "어떤 목표로 가는지, 누구와 가고 싶은지 등",
    "hotplace.myPostActive": "내 동반자 모집 진행 중",
    "hotplace.registerConfirm": "이 설정으로 등록하기",
    "hotplace.registerSeeker": "나도 동반자 구하기 🙋",
    "hotplace.searchInfo": "정보 검색",
    "hotplace.seekerCancelled": "구인 취소됨",
    "hotplace.seekerPreviewSub": "탭해서 신청하기 →",
    "hotplace.seekerRegistered": "✅ 동반자 구인 등록 완료!",
    "hotplace.tabInfo": "장소 정보",
    "hotplace.tabSeekers": "동반자 구하기",
    "hotplace.tipAttraction": "테마파크·관광명소는 동반자가 있으면 훨씬 즐거워요! 동반자 구하기 탭에서 지금 모집 중인 여행자를 만나보세요.",
    "hotplace.tipCity": "현지 맛집·핫플은 로컬을 아는 동반자와 함께라면 더 깊이 즐길 수 있어요!",
    "hotplace.tipClub": "혼자 가기 부담되는 클럽이나 라운지도 Migo로 동반자를 찾으면 안심하고 즐길 수 있어요!",
    "hotplace.tipNature": "해변·자연 명소는 같이 가면 안전하고 사진도 찍어줄 수 있어 더 좋아요 📸",
    "hotplace.tipTitle": "이 장소 팁",
    "hotplace.upTo": "최대",
    "map.locationConsentDesc1b": "주변 여행자들이 회원님의 위치를 볼 수 있습니다.",
    "map.locationConsentDesc1": "지도에 회원님의 위치가 표시되면,",
    "map.locationConsentDesc2b": "회원님이 직접 켤 때에만",
    "map.locationConsentDesc2c": " 공유됩니다 (자동 공유 아님).",
    "map.locationConsentDesc2": "위치는",
    "map.locationConsentDesc3": "언제든지 Off 버튼을 눌러 공유를 중단할 수 있습니다.",
    "map.locationConsentTitle": "📍 내 위치 공유하기",
    "map.locationConsentAgree": "동의하고 시작하기",
    "map.locationConsentPrivacy": "동의 시 Migo의 개인정보 처리방침에 따라 위치정보가 처리됩니다.",
    "map.profile": "프로필",
    "map.today": "오늘",
    "map.user": "여행자"
  },
  en: {
    "common.cancel": "Cancel",
    "common.deny": "Deny",
    "hotplace.cancelSeeker": "Cancel",
    "hotplace.defaultDesc": "I'm looking for a travel companion! 😊",
    "hotplace.emptyDesc": "Be the first to find a companion!\nSomeone will surely want to join 😊",
    "hotplace.emptyTitle": "No one is recruiting yet",
    "hotplace.joinBtn": "Let's go!",
    "hotplace.joinDesc": "Group created. Check your chats.",
    "hotplace.joinFail": "Application failed",
    "hotplace.joinNotifTitle": "A companion request arrived! 🎉",
    "hotplace.joinSuccess": "🎉 Join request sent!",
    "hotplace.maxMembersLabel": "Members needed",
    "hotplace.meetDateLabel": "Date (Optional)",
    "hotplace.meetTimeLabel": "Time (Optional)",
    "hotplace.membersUnit": " people",
    "hotplace.msgLabel": "Short message (Optional)",
    "hotplace.msgPlaceholder": "Where to go, who to go with, etc.",
    "hotplace.myPostActive": "My recruitment is active",
    "hotplace.registerConfirm": "Register with these settings",
    "hotplace.registerSeeker": "Find a companion too 🙋",
    "hotplace.searchInfo": "Search info",
    "hotplace.seekerCancelled": "Recruitment cancelled",
    "hotplace.seekerPreviewSub": "Tap to apply →",
    "hotplace.seekerRegistered": "✅ Recruitment registered!",
    "hotplace.tabInfo": "Place Info",
    "hotplace.tabSeekers": "Find Companion",
    "hotplace.tipAttraction": "Attractions are much more fun with companions! Meet travelers currently recruiting in the Find Companion tab.",
    "hotplace.tipCity": "Local hotspots are better enjoyed with companions who know the area!",
    "hotplace.tipClub": "Clubs or lounges are much more fun safely finding companions on Migo!",
    "hotplace.tipNature": "Beaches and nature spots are safer and better for taking photos when you go together 📸",
    "hotplace.tipTitle": "Place Tips",
    "hotplace.upTo": "Up to",
    "map.locationConsentDesc1b": "nearby travelers can see you.",
    "map.locationConsentDesc1": "When your location is shown on the map,",
    "map.locationConsentDesc2b": "when you manually turn it on",
    "map.locationConsentDesc2c": " — no automatic sharing.",
    "map.locationConsentDesc2": "Location is only shared",
    "map.locationConsentDesc3": "You can stop sharing at any time with the Off button.",
    "map.locationConsentTitle": "📍 Share My Location",
    "map.locationConsentAgree": "Allow & Start",
    "map.locationConsentPrivacy": "By agreeing, your location will be processed according to Migo's Privacy Policy.",
    "map.profile": "Profile",
    "map.today": "Today",
    "map.user": "Traveler"
  }
};

messages.message: 'query' is never reassigned. Use 'const' instead.

fix.text:
const query = supabase.from("trip_groups").select(`
        id, title, destination, dates, max_members, tags, status, entry_fee, is_premium, description,
        host_id, profiles:host_id(name, photo_url, bio),
        trip_group_members(user_id, profiles(name, photo_url, gender))
      `).in("status", ["recruiting", "almost_full"]).order("created_at", { ascending: false });

messages.message: React Hook useCallback has missing dependencies: 'getTranslateSendCount', 'incrementTranslateSendCount', and 'setShowPlusModal'. Either include them or remove the dependency array. If 'setShowPlusModal' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [message, isPlus, getTranslateSendCount, setShowPlusModal, targetLang, setMessage, incrementTranslateSendCount, sendMessage]

fix.text: [message, isPlus, getTranslateSendCount, setShowPlusModal, targetLang, setMessage, incrementTranslateSendCount, sendMessage]

source:
import { AnimatePresence, motion } from "framer-motion"; import { Beer, Crown, X, MapPin } from "lucide-react"; import i18n from "@/i18n"; interface LightningModalsProps { showLightningLoading: boolean; lightningResult: any | null; setLightningResult: (res: any | null) => void; showVipLightningFilter: boolean; setShowVipLightningFilter: (show: boolean) => void; vipFilter: { age: string; language: string; vibe: string }; setVipFilter: (filter: { age: string; language: string; vibe: string }) => void; executeLightningMatch: (isVipMode: boolean) => void; lightningMultiResult: any[] | null; setLightningMultiResult: (res: any[] | null) => void; confirmLightningMatch: (res?: any) => void; } export const LightningModals = ({ showLightningLoading, lightningResult, setLightningResult, showVipLightningFilter, setShowVipLightningFilter, vipFilter, setVipFilter, executeLightningMatch, lightningMultiResult, setLightningMultiResult, confirmLightningMatch }: LightningModalsProps) => { return ( <> {showLightningLoading && (
{i18n.t("auto.v2_scan_msg", "내 주변 매칭 탐색 중...")}

{i18n.t("auto.v2_scan_sub", "반경 3km 내의 핫플을 확인합니다")}

 )} {lightningResult && (

{i18n.t("auto.v2_basic_done", "매칭 완료!")}

{lightningResult.barName}

{lightningResult.members.map((m: any, i: number) => (
{m.name}
))}
)} {showVipLightningFilter && (
setShowVipLightningFilter(false)} />

{i18n.t("auto.v2_vip_title", "VIP 맞춤 번개")}

{i18n.t("auto.v2_vip_desc", "플러스 회원 전용 상세 매칭 필터")}

{["20s", "late20s", "30s"].map(a => ( ))}
{["ko", "global"].map(l => ( ))}
{["party", "chill", "food"].map(v => ( ))}
)} {lightningMultiResult && (

{i18n.t("auto.v2_vip_preview", "미리 보고 선택하기")}

{i18n.t("auto.v2_vip_select", "원하는 컨셉의 모임을 하나 선택하세요.")}

{lightningMultiResult.map(res => (
{res.vibeIcon}
{i18n.t("auto.v2_vip_premium", "PREMIUM")}

{res.title}

{res.barName}

{res.members.map((m: any, i: number) => ( ))}
+{res.members.length}
))}
)} ); };
